song_name: Demi Lovato - Cool For The Summer - Twenty One Pilots - Level Of Concern - Conan Gray - Maniac
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Cool For The Summer]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Tell me what you want[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
What you like[/tab]

It's okay
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
I'mma little curious too[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Tell me if it's wrong[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
If it's right[/tab]

I don't care
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I can keep a secret, could you?[/tab]

[Maniac]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                                                [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause people like you always want back what they can't have[/tab]

But I'm past that and you know that
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                                               [ch]G[/ch]
So you should turn back to your rat pack, tell 'em trash[/tab]

[Level Of Concern]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
'Cause I told you my level of concern[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Just need you to tell me we're alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Tell me we're okay[/tab]

[Maniac]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
You just went too far[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
Wrecked your car, called me crying in the dark[/tab]

Now you're breakin' my heart
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
So, I show up at your place right away[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C[/ch]
Wipe the tears off of your face[/tab]

While you beg me to stay

[Level Of Concern]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Wonderin' would you be (Would you be)[/tab]

My little quarantine? (Quarantine)
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
Or is this the way it ends?[/tab]

[Cool For The Summer]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]

We're cool for the summer

We're cool for the summer

[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
